config.title: DMF_TITLE
config.script:
#include "50637"
dim g_ButtonActionArray : set g_ButtonActionArray = nx_.new_array() dim g_ButtonNameArray : set g_ButtonNameArray = nx_.new_array() dim g_ButtonSize : set g_ButtonSize = nx_.new_array() dim g_pPage
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' API do wolania z zewnatrz '-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function configure_header()
end function
function configure_button(byval strNameButton, byref action,byval intSize)
g_ButtonActionArray.add action g_ButtonNameArray.add strNameButton g_ButtonSize.add intSize
end function
function add_action_hli(byref oHli)
'msgbox cStr(oHli.prop(100)) if g_ButtonNameArray(oHli.prop(100))<>"Anuluj" then g_ButtonActionArray(oHli.prop(100))(p_oAR) else g_ButtonActionArray(oHli.prop(100))() end if
end function
function build_buttons()
set pTBN = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT))
pTBN.section_foot.removeall pTBN.newrow 'pTBN.newcell.addtext("Akcje").cell.colspan = 7 'pTBN.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER 'pTBN.cell.styleitem=STYLE_TABLE_HEADER 'pTBN.newrow.cell.colspan = 7 pTBN.row.styleitem=STYLE_TABLE_HEADER 'PTBN.cell.colspan = 7
dim iter : iter=0
for iter=0 to g_ButtonActionArray.upper_index
set hli = doc_.createhli() hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI)="add_action_hli" hli.prop(100) = clng(iter)
if g_ButtonNameArray(iter)="Anuluj" then
'pTBN.newcell.addtext("").cell.width = clng(MAXIMIZE_SIZE) 'pTBN.newcell.addtext("").cell.width = clng(MAXIMIZE_SIZE) pTBN.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON, -1 pTBN.cell.colspan=12 pTBN.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTBN.cell.width = clng(MAXIMIZE_SIZE) with pTBN.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = g_ButtonNameArray(iter) .size = g_ButtonSize(iter) set .hli = hli end with
else pTBN.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON, -1
with pTBN.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = g_ButtonNameArray(iter) .size = g_ButtonSize(iter) set .hli = hli end with pTBN.newcell.cell.width = clng(5) end if next
end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
dim p_oAR dim p_oAR_sort dim pTB dim pTBN dim hli dim pTBTools dim intOption : intOption=0 dim intTypSortNazwa : intTypSortNazwa=1 'sposob sotrowania po nazwie - 1-asc, 2-desc dim intTypSortIndeks : intTypSortIndeks=1 'sposob sortowania po indeksie - 1-asc, 2-desc dim ctrl_zaznacz1, ctrl_zaznacz2,ctrl_zaznacz3 'zaznaczenie w grupie 1(nie zrealizowane), 2(nadmiar), 3(pozycje zrealizowane) ctrl_zaznacz1=1 ctrl_zaznacz2=0 ctrl_zaznacz3=1
function init(byref oAR, byref pPage) set p_oAR = oAR set g_pPage = pPage ctrl_zaznacz1=1 ctrl_zaznacz2=0 ctrl_zaznacz3=1
g_ButtonActionArray = null g_ButtonNameArray = null g_ButtonSize = null
set g_ButtonActionArray = nx_.new_array() set g_ButtonNameArray = nx_.new_array() set g_ButtonSize = nx_.new_array()
dim i : i = 0
do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(i) is nothing if ((p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc<>0)) then p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk = true else p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk = false end if i=i+1 loop
end function
function refresh_arkusz()
dim oAR : set oAR = nx_.slot0.new_dhm_diff()
if (intOption=1) then ar_zamowienie_dm oAR,g_pPage.root,true,1,false set p_oAR=oAR end if
if (intOption=2) then ar_zamowienie_dm oAR,g_pPage.root,true,1,true set p_oAR=oAR end if
if (intOption=3) then ar_sprzedaz_dm oAR,g_pPage.root,true,1,false set p_oAR=oAR end if
if (intOption=4) then ar_zakup_dm oAR,g_pPage.root,true,1,true set p_oAR=oAR end if fill_option()
end function
function sort_strNazwa(byref pHLI)
set p_oAR_sort = nx_.slot0.new_dhm_diff() dim strSposob,strIdobj,iter iter=0 strIdobj="" do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(iter) is nothing if p_oAR.get_pozycja(iter).add_new then strIdobj=strIdobj+cStr(p_oAR.get_pozycja(iter).id_produkt)+"," end if iter=iter+1 loop
strIdobj=mid(strIdobj,1,len(strIdobj)-1)
if intTypSortNazwa=1 then strSposob="asc" intTypSortNazwa=2 else strSposob="desc" intTypSortNazwa=1 end if
dim strSQL set strSQL=trans_.createadors("select 'idobj'=idobj from n5produkt where idobj in("+strIdobj+")"+_ "order by strNazwa "+strSposob)
iter=0 dim indeks_oAR
do while not strSQL.EOF indeks_oAR=p_oAR.get_index(strSQL.fields("idobj")) if p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).add_new then p_oAR.sortowanie iter,indeks_oAR 'p_oAR_sort.add_pozycja p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).strona, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).id_produkt, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).id_magazyn, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).id_dostawcy, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).cena, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).ilosc, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).max_magazyn, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).int_druk iter=iter+1 end if strSQL.MoveNext
loop 'set p_oAR = p_oAR_sort fill_option()
end function
function sort_strIndeks(byref pHLI)
set p_oAR_sort = nx_.slot0.new_dhm_diff() dim strSposob,strIdobj,iter iter=0 strIdobj="" do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(iter) is nothing if p_oAR.get_pozycja(iter).add_new then strIdobj=strIdobj+cStr(p_oAR.get_pozycja(iter).id_produkt)+"," end if iter=iter+1 loop
strIdobj=mid(strIdobj,1,len(strIdobj)-1)
if intTypSortIndeks=1 then strSposob="asc" intTypSortIndeks=2 else strSposob="desc" intTypSortIndeks=1 end if
dim strSQL set strSQL=trans_.createadors("select 'idobj'=idobj from n5produkt where idobj in("+strIdobj+")"+_ "order by strIndeks "+strSposob)
iter=0 dim indeks_oAR do while not strSQL.EOF indeks_oAR=p_oAR.get_index(strSQL.fields("idobj")) if p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).add_new then p_oAR.sortowanie iter,indeks_oAR 'p_oAR_sort.add_pozycja p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).strona, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).id_produkt, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).id_magazyn, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).id_dostawcy, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).cena, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).ilosc, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).max_magazyn, p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks_oAR).int_druk iter=iter+1 end if strSQL.MoveNext
loop 'set p_oAR = p_oAR_sort fill_option()
end function
function choose_produkt_nazwa(byref pHLI)
dim strSQL,strSQLMag,strSQLOpak dim idMag : idMag= trans_.var(3) dim pM43009 : set pM43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) pM43009.prepare_multi_selection TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, "Wybór produktu", "", "strNazwa" dim oNXArray : set oNXArray = pM43009.run_multi_browser()
if not oNXArray is nothing then dim idProd,p for each idProd in oNXArray 'dodanie do arkusza z opcja m_bAdd=false gdyz sa to pozycje dodane przez uzytkownika i one nie beda brane przy sortowaniu
set strSQLMag=trans_.createadors("select 'c_ilosc_opak'=isnull(sum(t_0.gms_curIlosc),0) "+_ "from n5gmstan as t_0 inner join n5magazyn as t_1 on t_0.gms_pMag = t_1.IdObj "+_ "inner join n5produkt as t_2 on t_0.gms_pProd = t_2.IdObj "+_ "inner join n5opakowanie_produktu as t_3 on t_0.gms_pOpak = t_3.IdObj "+_ "where (t_1.eTyp <> 2) and (t_1.idobj ="+cstr(idMag)+")"+_ "and (t_2.idobj = "+cstr(idProd)+")")
if ((intOption = OPTION_WZ) or (intOption = OPTION_SPRZE_WZ))then p_oAR.add_pozycja true,idProd,0,0,0,1,strSQLMag.fields("c_ilosc_opak"),1,false end if if ((intOption = OPTION_PZ) or (intOption = OPTION_ZAKUP_PZ)) then set strSQLOpak=trans_.createadors("select 'curcena'=c_curcenanetto1 from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania "+_ "where c_erodzaj=1 and p_idobj="+cstr(idProd)) p_oAR.add_pozycja true,idProd,0,0,strSQLOpak.fields("curcena"),1,strSQLMag.fields("c_ilosc_opak"),1,false end if
next end if
fill_option() set choose_produkt_nazwa = oNXArray
end function
function choose_produkt_indeks(byref pHLI)
dim idMag : idMag= trans_.var(3) dim strSQL,strSQLMag,strSQLOpak dim pM43009 : set pM43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) pM43009.prepare_multi_selection TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, "Wybór produktu", "", "strIndeks" dim oNXArray : set oNXArray = pM43009.run_multi_browser() if not oNXArray is nothing then dim idProd,p for each idProd in oNXArray 'dodanie do arkusza z opcja m_bAdd=false gdyz sa to pozycje dodane przez uzytkownika i one nie beda brane przy sortowaniu
set strSQLMag=trans_.createadors("select 'c_ilosc_opak'=isnull(sum(t_0.gms_curIlosc),0) "+_ "from n5gmstan as t_0 inner join n5magazyn as t_1 on t_0.gms_pMag = t_1.IdObj "+_ "inner join n5produkt as t_2 on t_0.gms_pProd = t_2.IdObj "+_ "inner join n5opakowanie_produktu as t_3 on t_0.gms_pOpak = t_3.IdObj "+_ "where (t_1.eTyp <> 2) and (t_1.idobj ="+cstr(idMag)+")"+_ "and (t_2.idobj = "+cstr(idProd)+")")
if ((intOption = OPTION_WZ) or (intOption = OPTION_SPRZE_WZ)) then p_oAR.add_pozycja true,idProd,0,0,0,1,strSQLMag.fields("c_ilosc_opak"),1,false end if if ((intOption = OPTION_PZ) or (intOption = OPTION_ZAKUP_PZ)) then set strSQLOpak=trans_.createadors("select 'curcena'=c_curcenanetto1 from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania "+_ "where c_erodzaj=1 and p_idobj="+cstr(idProd)) p_oAR.add_pozycja true,idProd,0,0,strSQLOpak.fields("curcena"),1,strSQLMag.fields("c_ilosc_opak"),1,false end if
next end if
fill_option() set choose_produkt_indeks = oNXArray
end function
function choose_magazyn(byref pHLI)
'pHLI.prop(110) dim strSQL dim pM43009 : set pM43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) pM43009.prepare_single_selection TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN, "Wybór magazynu", "eTyp=1", "strNazwa" choose_magazyn = pM43009.run_browser() set strSQL= trans_.createadors("select 'strMagazyn'=strNazwa from n5magazyn where idobj="+cStr(choose_magazyn))
if strSQL.BOF=false then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CHOOSE_MAGAZYN).value=cStr(strSQL.fields("strMagazyn"))
dim i,strSQLMag i=0
do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(i) is nothing
set strSQLMag=trans_.createadors("select 'c_ilosc_opak'=isnull(sum(t_0.gms_curIlosc),0) "+_ "from n5gmstan as t_0 inner join n5magazyn as t_1 on t_0.gms_pMag = t_1.IdObj "+_ "inner join n5produkt as t_2 on t_0.gms_pProd = t_2.IdObj "+_ "inner join n5opakowanie_produktu as t_3 on t_0.gms_pOpak = t_3.IdObj "+_ "where (t_1.eTyp <> 2) and (t_1.idobj ="+cstr(choose_magazyn)+")"+_ "and (t_2.idobj = "+cstr(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).id_produkt)+")")
p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).max_magazyn=strSQLMag.fields("c_ilosc_opak") i=i+1 loop fill_option() else choose_magazyn=clng(pHLI.prop(110)) trans_.var(3) = clng(choose_magazyn) exit function end if
trans_.var(3) = clng(choose_magazyn)
end function
function configure_tools()
dim eTypDok set pTBTools = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_NARZEDZIA_TABLE)) pTBTools.removeall 'pTBTools.newrow 'pTBTools.newcell.addtext("") pTBTools.newrow pTBTools.newcell.addtext("Magazyn").element.bold = true pTBTools.cell.styleitem =STYLE_TABLE_HEADER
if intOption = 4 then eTypDok=7 end if
if intOption = 3 then eTypDok=1 end if
if intOption = 2 then eTypDok=34 end if
if intOption = 1 then eTypDok=33 end if
dim oMag : set oMag = trans_.createadors("select 'nazwa'=m.strnazwa ,'indeks'=m.idobj from n5rejestrdok as r inner join n5magazyn as m on m.idobj=r.wrefParam2 where r.etyp="+cStr(eTypDok))
if oMag.BOF then trans_.var(3) = clng(0) else trans_.var(3) = clng(oMag.fields("indeks")) end if pTBTools.newrow pTBTools.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY pTBTools.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_EDIT, CTRLID_CHOOSE_MAGAZYN with pTBTools.element .value=cStr(oMag.fields("nazwa")) .size=14 end with pTBTools.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1 with pTBTools.element .image=clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5MAGAZYN) .width=Clng(HEIGHT_FOR_12PX) .height=Clng(HEIGHT_FOR_12PX) .tip="Wybór z listy" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "choose_magazyn" .hli.prop(110) = clng(oMag.fields("indeks")) end with
end function
'---------------------------------------------------- 'konfiguracja checbox, zaznaczenie '---------------------------------------------------- function config_listings(byval ctr1, byval ctr2, byval ctr3 )
if ctr1 then page_.ctrl(20).value="1" else page_.ctrl(20).value="0" end if if ctr2 then page_.ctrl(21).value="1" else page_.ctrl(21).value="0" end if
if ctr3 then page_.ctrl(22).value="1" else page_.ctrl(22).value="0" end if end function
'---------------------------------------------------- 'konfiguracja checbox, wspawienie odpowiedniego tesktu '----------------------------------------------------
function config_listings_text(byval text1, byval text2, byval text3)
page_.ctrl(200).text=text1 page_.ctrl(201).text=text2 page_.ctrl(202).text=text3 'page_.ctrl(1112) ' set hli = doc_.createhli() ' hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI)="add_action_hli" ' hli.prop(100) = clng(iter)
end function
'---------------------------------------------------- 'wyznaczenie ktore roznice maja byc wyswietlane na podstwie zaznaczonych checbox '----------------------------------------------------
function fill_option()
if ((page_.ctrl(20).value) and (page_.ctrl(21).value) and (page_.ctrl(22).value)) then header(intOption) fill_all 1 fill_all 2 fill_all 3 exit function end if
if ((page_.ctrl(20).value) and ( not page_.ctrl(21).value) and (not page_.ctrl(22).value)) then header(intOption) fill_all 1 exit function end if
if ((not page_.ctrl(20).value) and (page_.ctrl(21).value) and (not page_.ctrl(22).value)) then header(intOption) fill_all 2 exit function end if
if ((not page_.ctrl(20).value) and (not page_.ctrl(21).value) and (page_.ctrl(22).value)) then header(intOption) fill_all 3 exit function end if
if ((page_.ctrl(20).value) and (page_.ctrl(21).value) and (not page_.ctrl(22).value)) then header(intOption) fill_all 1 fill_all 2 exit function end if
if ((not page_.ctrl(20).value) and (page_.ctrl(21).value) and (page_.ctrl(22).value)) then header(intOption) fill_all 2 fill_all 3 exit function end if
if ((page_.ctrl(20).value) and (not page_.ctrl(21).value) and (page_.ctrl(22).value)) then header(intOption) fill_all 1 fill_all 3 exit function end if
if ((not page_.ctrl(20).value) and (not page_.ctrl(21).value) and (not page_.ctrl(22).value)) then header(intOption) build_buttons() exit function end if
end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_ALL##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)
c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_ALL##_ongetdata = true
end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_ALL##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue):c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_ALL##_ondataentered = true
dim intoption,bflags dim i,j i=0 intoption=oCtrl.userprop(102)
if intoption=1 then do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(i) is nothing
if ((p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc<>0)) then if cCur(newValue)= 1 then p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=true else p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=false end if end if i=i+1 loop 'fill_option() ctrl_zaznacz1=newValue end if if intoption=2 then
do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(i) is nothing
if ((not p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc<>0)) then if cCur(newValue)= 1 then p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=true else p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=false end if end if i=i+1 loop 'fill_option() ctrl_zaznacz2=newValue end if if intoption=3 then
do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(i) is nothing
if ((p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc=0)) then
bflags=1 j=0 do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(j) is nothing if ((j<>i) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona <> p_oAR.get_pozycja(j).strona) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).id_produkt=p_oAR.get_pozycja(j).id_produkt)) then bflags=0 exit do end if j=j+1 loop if bflags then if cCur(newValue)= 1 then p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=true else p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=false end if end if end if i=i+1 loop 'fill_option() ctrl_zaznacz3=newValue end if
dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent set oRow = oRow.nextelement do while not oRow is nothing
if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(50) then if oRow.userprop.prop(50) = clng(intoption) then oRow.cell(3).element(1).value = newValue end if end if end if
set oRow = oRow.nextelement loop 'oCtrl.value=newValue
end function
function c20_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c20_ongetdata=true end function
function c20_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue)
fill_option() c20_ondataentered=true
end function
function c21_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c21_ongetdata=true end function
function c21_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue)
fill_option() c21_ondataentered=true
end function
function c22_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c22_ongetdata=true end function
function c22_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue)
fill_option() c22_ondataentered=true
end function
function c##CTRLID_INDEX_STATIC##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_INDEX_STATIC##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_INDEX_STATIC##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_INDEX_STATIC##_ongetdata = true 'pCtrl.value = cStr(44) end function
function c##CTRLID_INDEX_STATIC##_oncmdlist(pCtrl,pCmdList)
if (pCtrl.userprop(100) > -1) then if not pCtrl.userprop(102) then dim pHli:set pHli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='delete_row' vn1='"+cstr(pCtrl.userprop(100)) + "' vn2='" + cstr(pCtrl.userprop(101)) + "' vn3='" + cstr(pCtrl.userprop(102)) + "'") pCmdList.addcommand "Usuń wiersz",pHli end if end if end function
function c##CTRLID_INX##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_INX##_ondataentered = true
dim idobj_produktu,bLeft,bAdd idobj_produktu=pCtrl.userprop(100) bLeft = pCtrl.userprop(101) bAdd = pCtrl.userprop(102) dim indeks
indeks=p_oAR.get_indeks(idobj_produktu,bLeft,bAdd)
if ((p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks).max_magazyn < cCur(varValue)) and ((intOption=1) or (intOption=3) ) ) then pCtrl.value = cCur(p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks).max_magazyn) p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks).int_druk = cCur(varValue) else pCtrl.value = varValue p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks).int_druk = cCur(varValue) end if
end function
function c##CTRLID_INX##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_INX##_ongetdata = true 'pCtrl.value = cStr(44) end function
function c##CTRLID_INX##_oncmdlist(pCtrl,pCmdList)
if (pCtrl.userprop(100) > -1) then if not pCtrl.userprop(102) then dim pHli:set pHli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='delete_row' vn1='"+cstr(pCtrl.userprop(100)) + "' vn2='" + cstr(pCtrl.userprop(101)) + "' vn3='" + cstr(pCtrl.userprop(102)) + "'") pCmdList.addcommand "Usuń wiersz",pHli end if end if end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)
c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ongetdata = true
end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue)
dim idobj_produktu,bLeft,bAdd idobj_produktu=oCtrl.userprop(100) bLeft = oCtrl.userprop(101) bAdd = oCtrl.userprop(102)
dim indeks indeks=p_oAR.get_indeks(idobj_produktu,bLeft,bAdd)
if (newValue=0) then p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks).druk = false else p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks).druk = true end if
c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ondataentered = true
end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_oncmdlist(pCtrl,pCmdList)
if (pCtrl.userprop(100) > -1) then if not pCtrl.userprop(102) then dim pHli:set pHli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='delete_row' vn1='"+cstr(pCtrl.userprop(100)) + "' vn2='" + cstr(pCtrl.userprop(101)) + "' vn3='" + cstr(pCtrl.userprop(102)) + "'") pCmdList.addcommand "Usuń wiersz",pHli end if end if end function
function c##CTRLID_CENA##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_CENA##_ondataentered = true
dim idobj_produktu,bLeft,bAdd idobj_produktu=pCtrl.userprop(100) bLeft = pCtrl.userprop(101) bAdd = pCtrl.userprop(102) dim indeks
indeks=p_oAR.get_indeks(idobj_produktu,bLeft,bAdd)
pCtrl.value = varValue p_oAR.get_pozycja(indeks).cena = cCur(varValue)
end function
function c##CTRLID_CENA##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_CENA##_ongetdata = true 'pCtrl.value = cStr(44) end function
function c##CTRLID_CENA##_oncmdlist(pCtrl,pCmdList)
if (pCtrl.userprop(100) > -1) then if not pCtrl.userprop(102) then dim pHli:set pHli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='delete_row' vn1='"+cstr(pCtrl.userprop(100)) + "' vn2='" + cstr(pCtrl.userprop(101)) + "' vn3='" + cstr(pCtrl.userprop(102)) + "'") pCmdList.addcommand "Usuń wiersz",pHli end if end if
end function
function delete_row(hli) dim idobj_produktu : idobj_produktu = hli.prop(1) dim bstrona : bstrona = hli.prop(2) dim bAddNew : bAddNew = hli.prop(3) dim indeks
indeks=p_oAR.get_indeks(idobj_produktu,bstrona,bAddNew) p_oAR.remove_pozycja(indeks) fill_option() end function
function minimum(byval curWal1, byval curWal2)
if (curWal1 < curWal2) then minimum = curWal1 else minimum = curWal2 end if
end function
'---------------------------------------------------- 'funckja naglowka tabeli '----------------------------------------------------
function header(byval int_option)
set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE)) pTB.section_head.removeall pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext("Strona").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Indeks produktu").element.bold = true with pTB.element set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "sort_strIndeks" end with
pTB.newcell.addtext("Produkt/Opakowanie").element.bold = true with pTB.element set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "sort_strNazwa" end with
if ((int_option = OPTION_WZ) or (int_option = OPTION_SPRZE_WZ)) then pTB.newcell.addtext("Różnica").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość na magazynie").element.bold = true end if if ((int_option = OPTION_PZ) or (int_option = OPTION_ZAKUP_PZ)) then pTB.newcell.addtext("Różnica").element.bold = true end if
intOption = int_option pTB.newcell.cell.colspan=1 pTB.element.bold=true pTB.addtext ("Ilość")
pTB.element.size = clng(9) if ((int_option = OPTION_PZ) or (int_option = OPTION_ZAKUP_PZ)) then pTB.newcell.addtext("Cena jed.").element.bold = true end if pTB.section_body.removeall
end function
'---------------------------------------------------- 'wypalnianie tabeli roznic na podstawie zaznaczonych opcji - 1-nadmiar po lewej, 2-nadmiar po prawej, 3-czesc wspolna '----------------------------------------------------
function fill_all(byref option_v)
dim oProd dim i dim j dim bflags dim pHli dim intDokladnosc
'wypelnij pozycjami zgodnymi
dim curIloscRoznicowa
if option_v=3 then
i=0
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell 'pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1).element.border = 0 'pTB.element.customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_ALL) 'pTB.element.transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") ' ' set pHli = doc_.createhli() ' pHli.prop(102) = clng(3) ' set pTB.element.userprop = pHli ' pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATIC, -1'.text = " Pozycje zrealizowane" with pTB.element .text = " Pozycje zrealizowane" .fontsize=3 '.fontname="Verdana" .bold=false ' .value=cStr(ctrl_zaznacz3) end with
if ((intOption = OPTION_WZ) or (intOption = OPTION_SPRZE_WZ)) then pTB.cell.colspan=6 else pTB.cell.colspan=6 end if pTB.cell.styleitem=STYLE_TABLE_BODY pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_LEFT do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(i) is nothing 'p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=false set oProd = trans_.createadors("select 'nazwa'=prod.strnazwa, 'indeks'=prod.strindeks,'idobj'=prod.idobj, "+_ "'dokladnosc'=jedn.nDokladnosc, 'skrot'=jedn.strskrot ,'cena'=v.c_curcenanetto1, "+_ "'waluta'=wal.strskrot, 'jedw'=wal.ndokladnosc from n5produkt as prod "+_ "inner join n5jednostka as jedn on jedn.idobj=prod.pJednostkaEwid "+_ "inner join vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania as v on v.p_idobj=prod.idobj "+_ "inner join n5jednostka as wal on wal.idobj=v.c_pwaluta "+_ "where prod.idobj="+cstr(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).id_produkt))
if (cCur(oProd.fields("dokladnosc"))=5) then intDokladnosc=4 else intDokladnosc=cCur(oProd.fields("dokladnosc")) end if
pTB.newrow pTB.row.backcolor = rgb(251,247,64) 'pTB.row.bordercolor=RGB(10, 10, 155) if ((p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc=0)) then
bflags=1 j=0 do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(j) is nothing if ((j<>i) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona <> p_oAR.get_pozycja(j).strona) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).id_produkt=p_oAR.get_pozycja(j).id_produkt)) then bflags=0 exit do end if j=j+1 loop if bflags then
'odznaczenie drukowania-tych pozycji juz nie mozna wypelniac na dokumentach p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=false
pTB.newcell.addtext("lewa") 'pTB.newcell.addtext oProd.fields("indeks")
pTB.NewCell.AddCtrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX, -1 pTB.element.text = oProd.fields("indeks") pTB.element.customredirect = clng(CTRLID_INDEX_STATIC) pTB.element.transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom")
set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
dim oBtnHLI : set oBtnHLI = doc_.createhli()
pTB.newcell.addtext cStr(oProd.fields("nazwa")) pTB.cell.width=clng(100) pTB.cell.keepline = true 'pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1).element.border = 0 'pTB.element.customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX) 'pTB.element.transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom")
'set pHli = doc_.createhli() 'pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) 'pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) 'pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) 'set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
' pTB.element.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX, -1).text = oProd.fields("nazwa") ' pTB.element.width=clng(5450) ' if p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk then ' pTB.element.value = "1" ' else ' pTB.element.value = "0" 'end if
'set pTB.row.userprop = doc_.createhli() 'with pTB.row.userprop ' .prop(50) = clng(3) 'end with
if ((intOption = 1) or (intOption = 3)) then pTB.newcell.addtext cStr(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc,intDokladnosc))+" "+oProd.fields("skrot") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext cStr(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).max_magazyn,intDokladnosc))+" "+oProd.fields("skrot") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if
if ((intOption = 2) or (intOption = 4)) then pTB.newcell.addtext cStr(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc,intDokladnosc))+" "+oProd.fields("skrot") pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if
if ((intOption = OPTION_WZ) or (intOption = OPTION_SPRZE_WZ)) then curIloscRoznicowa = minimum(cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).int_druk,intDokladnosc)), cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).max_magazyn,intDokladnosc))) else curIloscRoznicowa = cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).int_druk,intDokladnosc)) end if
p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).int_druk=curIloscRoznicowa
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1 with pTB.element .size=10 .value = curIloscRoznicowa .precision=oProd.fields("dokladnosc")-1 .unit=oProd.fields("skrot") .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_INX) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") .readonly=true end with set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
if ((intOption = OPTION_PZ) or (intOption = OPTION_ZAKUP_PZ)) then pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1 with pTB.element .size=10 .value = cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).cena,intDokladnosc)) .precision=oProd.fields("jedw")-1 .unit=oProd.fields("waluta") .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_CENA) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT end if end if end if i=i+1 loop end if
'wypelnij pozycjami tylko po prawej stronie gdzie ilosc>0 if option_v=2 then
i=0
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1).element.border = 0 pTB.element.customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_ALL) pTB.element.transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom")
set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(102) = clng(2) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.element.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC, -1).text = "Pozycje nadmiarowe" with pTB.element .fontsize=6 .fontname="Verdana" .bold=true .value=cStr(ctrl_zaznacz2) end with
if ((intOption = OPTION_WZ) or (intOption = OPTION_SPRZE_WZ)) then pTB.cell.colspan=6 else pTB.cell.colspan=6 end if pTB.cell.styleitem=STYLE_TABLE_BODY pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_LEFT
do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(i) is nothing 'p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=false set oProd = trans_.createadors("select 'nazwa'=prod.strnazwa, 'indeks'=prod.strindeks,'idobj'=prod.idobj, "+_ "'dokladnosc'=jedn.nDokladnosc, 'skrot'=jedn.strskrot ,'cena'=v.c_curcenanetto1, "+_ "'waluta'=wal.strskrot, 'jedw'=wal.ndokladnosc from n5produkt as prod "+_ "inner join n5jednostka as jedn on jedn.idobj=prod.pJednostkaEwid "+_ "inner join vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania as v on v.p_idobj=prod.idobj "+_ "inner join n5jednostka as wal on wal.idobj=v.c_pwaluta "+_ "where prod.idobj="+cstr(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).id_produkt))
if (cCur(oProd.fields("dokladnosc"))=5) then intDokladnosc=4 else intDokladnosc=cCur(oProd.fields("dokladnosc")) end if
pTB.newrow pTB.row.backcolor = rgb(253,251,147)
if ((not p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc<>0)) then
'p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=false
pTB.newcell.addtext("prawa")
'pTB.newcell.addtext oProd.fields("indeks") pTB.NewCell.AddCtrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX, -1 pTB.element.text = oProd.fields("indeks") pTB.element.customredirect = clng(CTRLID_INDEX_STATIC) pTB.element.transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom")
set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.newcell pTB.cell.keepline = false pTB.cell.width=clng(100) pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1).element.border = 0 pTB.element.customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX)
pTB.element.transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.element.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX, -1).text = oProd.fields("nazwa") pTB.element.width=clng(5450) if p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk then pTB.element.value = "1" else pTB.element.value = "0" end if
set pTB.row.userprop = doc_.createhli() with pTB.row.userprop .prop(50) = clng(2) end with
if ((intOption = 1) or (intOption = 3)) then pTB.newcell.addtext cStr(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc,intDokladnosc))+" "+oProd.fields("skrot") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext cStr(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).max_magazyn,intDokladnosc))+" "+oProd.fields("skrot") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if
if ((intOption = 2) or (intOption = 4)) then pTB.newcell.addtext cStr(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc,intDokladnosc))+" "+oProd.fields("skrot") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if
if ((intOption = OPTION_WZ) or (intOption = OPTION_SPRZE_WZ)) then curIloscRoznicowa = minimum(cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).int_druk,intDokladnosc)), cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).max_magazyn,intDokladnosc))) else curIloscRoznicowa = cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).int_druk,intDokladnosc)) end if
p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).int_druk=curIloscRoznicowa pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1 with pTB.element .size=10 .value = curIloscRoznicowa .precision=oProd.fields("dokladnosc")-1 .unit=oProd.fields("skrot") .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_INX) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
if ((intOption = OPTION_PZ) or (intOption = OPTION_ZAKUP_PZ)) then pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1 with pTB.element .size=10 .value = cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).cena,intDokladnosc)) .precision=oProd.fields("jedw")-1 .unit=oProd.fields("waluta") .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_CENA) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT end if
end if i=i+1 loop end if
'wypelnij pozycjami tylko po lewej stronie gdzie ilosc>0 if option_v=1 then
i=0
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1).element.border = 0 pTB.element.transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") pTB.element.customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_ALL)
set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(102) = clng(1) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.element.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC, -1).text = "Pozycje do zrealizowania" with pTB.element .fontsize=6 .fontname="Verdana" .bold=true .value=cStr(ctrl_zaznacz1) end with
if ((intOption = OPTION_WZ) or (intOption = OPTION_SPRZE_WZ)) then pTB.cell.colspan=6 else pTB.cell.colspan=6 end if pTB.cell.styleitem=STYLE_TABLE_BODY pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_LEFT
do while not p_oAR.get_pozycja(i) is nothing 'p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=false set oProd = trans_.createadors("select 'nazwa'=prod.strnazwa, 'indeks'=prod.strindeks,'idobj'=prod.idobj, "+_ "'dokladnosc'=jedn.nDokladnosc, 'skrot'=jedn.strskrot ,'cena'=v.c_curcenanetto1, "+_ "'waluta'=wal.strskrot, 'jedw'=wal.ndokladnosc from n5produkt as prod "+_ "inner join n5jednostka as jedn on jedn.idobj=prod.pJednostkaEwid "+_ "inner join vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania as v on v.p_idobj=prod.idobj "+_ "inner join n5jednostka as wal on wal.idobj=v.c_pwaluta "+_ "where prod.idobj="+cstr(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).id_produkt))
if (cCur(oProd.fields("dokladnosc"))=5) then intDokladnosc=4 else intDokladnosc=cCur(oProd.fields("dokladnosc")) end if
pTB.newrow if (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) then pTB.row.backcolor = rgb(254,253,211) else pTB.row.backcolor = rgb(247,134,137) end if
if ((p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) and (p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc<>0)) then 'p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk=true pTB.newcell.addtext("lewa") 'pTB.newcell.addctrl 5555, -1 'pTB.newcell.addtext oProd.fields("indeks")
pTB.NewCell.AddCtrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX, -1 pTB.element.text = oProd.fields("indeks") pTB.element.customredirect = clng(CTRLID_INDEX_STATIC) pTB.element.transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.newcell pTB.cell.keepline = false pTB.cell.width=clng(100) pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1).element.border = 0
pTB.element.customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX) pTB.element.transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom")
set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.element.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX,-1).text =oProd.fields("nazwa") pTB.element.width=clng(5450) if p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).druk then pTB.element.value = "1" else pTB.element.value = "0" end if
set pTB.row.userprop = doc_.createhli() with pTB.row.userprop .prop(50) = clng(1) end with if ((intOption = 1) or (intOption = 3)) then pTB.newcell.addtext cStr(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc,intDokladnosc))+" "+oProd.fields("skrot") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext cStr(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).max_magazyn,intDokladnosc))+" "+oProd.fields("skrot") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if
if ((intOption = 2) or (intOption = 4)) then pTB.newcell.addtext cStr(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).ilosc,intDokladnosc))+" "+oProd.fields("skrot") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if
if ((intOption = OPTION_WZ) or (intOption = OPTION_SPRZE_WZ)) then curIloscRoznicowa = minimum(cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).int_druk,intDokladnosc)), cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).max_magazyn,intDokladnosc))) else curIloscRoznicowa = cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).int_druk,intDokladnosc)) end if
p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).int_druk=curIloscRoznicowa pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1 with pTB.element .size=10 .value = curIloscRoznicowa .precision=oProd.fields("dokladnosc")-1 .unit=oProd.fields("skrot") .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_INX) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
if ((intOption = OPTION_PZ) or (intOption = OPTION_ZAKUP_PZ)) then pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1 with pTB.element .size=10 .value = cCur(trans_.afc.convert.roundn(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).cena,intDokladnosc)) .precision=oProd.fields("jedw")-1 .unit=oProd.fields("waluta") .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_CENA) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(oProd.fields("idobj")) pHli.prop(101) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).strona) pHli.prop(102) = clng(p_oAR.get_pozycja(i).add_new) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT end if
end if i=i+1 loop
'miejsce na dodanie nowych pozycji
pTB.newrow pTB.row.backcolor = rgb(254,253,211)
pTB.newcell.addtext("lewa") pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1 with pTB.element .image=clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT) .width=Clng(HEIGHT_FOR_12PX) .height=Clng(HEIGHT_FOR_12PX) .tip="Wybór z listy" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "choose_produkt_indeks" .hli.prop(110) = clng(1) end with
pTB.newcell pTB.cell.keepline = false pTB.cell.width=clng(100) 'PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT
pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1 with pTB.element .image=clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT) .width=Clng(HEIGHT_FOR_12PX) .height=Clng(HEIGHT_FOR_12PX) .tip="Wybór z listy" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "choose_produkt_nazwa" .hli.prop(110) = clng(1) end with
'pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1).element.border = 0
'pTB.element.customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX) 'pTB.element.transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom")
'set pHli = doc_.createhli() 'pHli.prop(100) = clng(0) 'pHli.prop(101) = clng(0) 'set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
'pTB.element.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX,-1).text ="" 'pTB.element.width=clng(5450) 'pTB.element.value = "1"
' set pTB.row.userprop = doc_.createhli() ' with pTB.row.userprop ' .prop(50) = clng(1) ' end with if ((intOption = 1) or (intOption = 3)) then pTB.newcell.addtext cStr("") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext cStr("") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if
if ((intOption = 2) or (intOption = 4)) then pTB.newcell.addtext cStr("") PTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1 with pTB.element .size=10 .value = cCur(0.0) .precision=2 .unit="" .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_INX) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(0) pHli.prop(101) = clng(0) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
if ((intOption = OPTION_PZ) or (intOption = OPTION_ZAKUP_PZ)) then pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1 with pTB.element .size=10 .value = cCur(0.0) .precision=2 .unit="" .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_CENA) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(100) = clng(-1) pHli.prop(101) = clng(-1) set pTB.element.userprop = pHli
pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT end if
end if
end function
